title: New Slab Variants
description: Shouldn't every block have a slab? From now on, players will have more than 200 new slabs, with textures similar to the game's vanilla blocks!
body:
![NEW SLAB VARIANTS BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ns0BvMIG/images/6bcbf019c6446c1028a55682fe1209fd03731048.webp) Shouldn't every block have a slab? From now on, players will have more than 200 new slabs, with textures similar to the game's vanilla blocks! In this way, the decorative possibilities will be endless, and ideal for any modded experience. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![NEW SLAB VARIANTS SUMMARY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ns0BvMIG/images/9c2296db15cfe57a02290bc6c595f665df0fb356.webp) The goal of this mod is to fulfill the desire of many players, which is none other than to allow you to make slabs using a lot of different building blocks, as well as new varieties. For example, players will have the opportunity to obtain new wooden tiles, or even tiles made from mineral blocks. ![NEW SLAB VARIANTS F.A.Q](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ns0BvMIG/images/8f4ae612bcd30c04c64b989fe77b968765d647b4.webp) ### This mod is compatible with other mods that add slabs? This is really not easy to say without first analyzing the mods in question, but there should be no problem when using it with other decorative mods. In any case, if you have any inconvenience you can leave a comment and we will work to make everything work correctly. ### Can slabs be placed on top of others? The slabs work exactly the same as in the default version, but yes, you can make use of other mods that facilitate the placement of slabs of different materials in the same block. ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![NEW SLAB VARIANTS SCREENSHOTS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ns0BvMIG/images/b0ace2b56a7530aec18de1ec5458bb0a79819079.webp) ![NEW SLAB VARIANTS IMAGE 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ns0BvMIG/images/5caa6016fc72739ca7b6aedec4a78c9495f713d0.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
